summary: AiSteth Phase 4 GDPR/HIPAA privacy refactor + height/weight QRISK + server-side AI narrative — comprehensive backend and frontend testing completed successfully
passed_tests: Backend: All 22 API tests passed (100% success rate)
Backend: Patient creation with phone/sex/ethnicity only (no name/email)
Backend: Correctly rejects name/email fields with 400 (GDPR/HIPAA compliant)
Backend: Patient codes generated as PT-XXXXXX format
Backend: GET /api/privacy returns version 1.0 with 6 principles
Backend: GET /api/patients/{id}/export returns complete patient data (GDPR Art. 20)
Backend: POST /api/patients/{id}/forget cascades delete (GDPR Art. 17)
Backend: POST /api/narrative generates AI text via Mistral with caching
Backend: Narrative caching works (second identical request returns cached:true)
Backend: All regression tests passing (snapshots, assessments, stats)
Frontend: Patients page shows 'PSEUDONYMISED · GDPR / HIPAA AWARE' badge
Frontend: Patient dialog has only phone/sex/ethnicity fields (no name/email visible)
Frontend: Patient cards display PT-XXXXXX codes and masked phone numbers
Frontend: Patient detail page shows code, Export button, Forget button
Frontend: Data rights section visible with GDPR Art. 20 and Art. 17 mentions
Frontend: Export downloads JSON file with correct naming (aisteth-export-PT-XXXXXX-YYYY-MM-DD.json)
Frontend: Scan page loads with patientCode parameter (PT-TEST01 displayed)
Frontend: Height input present (id='height-input', data-testid='aisteth-height-input')
Frontend: Weight input present (id='weight-input', data-testid='aisteth-weight-input')
Frontend: BMI auto-calculation script present with 'auto' tag
Frontend: No uncaught JS errors on scan page
